name: DaisyDisk
description: Disk space analyzer — visual sunburst map of storage usage with fast scanning

extraction.notes: Likely Sparkle feed URL. Verify by checking SUFeedURL in the app bundle's Info.plist. The exact URL may differ slightly (e.g. /appcast.xml or /appcast.php).

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase with free trial). Also available on Mac App Store (id411643860). Uses Sparkle for auto-updates in the direct download version. The static download URL at /downloads/DaisyDisk.zip always serves the latest version. Appcast URL is the most likely pattern but should be confirmed from the app bundle.
